input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.3.2
            TITLE: event day discussion

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.3.2: Event Day Discussion
S.3.3.2 Event Day Discussion 
Discussion at the Competition with the Cost Judges around the team’s vehicle.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 120 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Event Day Discussion Discussion at the Competition with the Cost Judges around the team’s vehicle.
